cases.name: root
cases.stdout:
ooxml is the Rust port of ooxml-cli for proven OOXML automation.

It exposes only the command surface implemented in Rust. Use `ooxml --json capabilities` for the machine-readable inventory.

Usage:
  ooxml [flags]
  ooxml [command]

Available Commands:
  agent-triage  Emit one-call agent triage JSON with quick refs, health, discovery filters, and safe next actions.
  apply         Apply a JSON batch of mutation operations to one OOXML package through the same session engine used by serve and MCP.
  capabilities  Emit the Rust-supported machine-readable command and object inventory.
  completion    Generate shell completion scripts for Rust-supported top-level commands.
  conformance   Show Rust-supported conformance reports.
  convert       Convert supported OOXML packages.
  diff          Compare two OOXML packages semantically, with optional PPTX visual render diff.
  doctor        Run read-only environment checks for agent/release workflows.
  docx          Work with Rust-supported DOCX document commands.
  find          Search supported OOXML package text, formulas, and defined names; optionally emit or apply generated mutation ops.
  help          Show Rust-supported command help.
  inspect       Inspect a supported OOXML package.
  mcp           Run the MCP stdio server backed by the same Rust session engine.
  pptx          Work with Rust-supported PPTX presentation commands.
  repair        Normalize recoverable OOXML package issues.
  robot-docs    Print the Rust-supported agent guide.
  serve         Run the JSON-RPC 2.0 stdio session server for web and agent workflows.
  template      Extract and apply design tokens across PPTX/XLSX templates.
  validate      Validate an OOXML package.
  vba           Inspect and edit Rust-supported VBA macro project surfaces.
  verify        Validate and compare a package against a baseline where supported.
  version       Print the version of ooxml.
  xlsx          Work with Rust-supported XLSX workbook commands.

Global Flags:
  -f, --format json          emit JSON output for JSON-capable commands
      --json                 emit JSON output
      --strict               enable strict validation mode

Use "ooxml help [command]" for Rust-supported command help.
Parent/group capability paths are help surfaces; invoke a listed leaf command for work.
